summary: The swarm divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in connection handling and stream polling returns; no swarm behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 170: M	crates/net/network/src/swarm.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to None/Some/Poll returns and continue statements in incoming connection, state action, session event, connection event, and pending paths.
No shutdown rejection, incoming capacity handling, outbound dialing, discovered node handling, session event handling, listener event handling, or stream polling behavior changed.
